review_question: Is the workplace algorithm recorded with owner, purpose, data, vendor, decision role, worker impact, and status?
Are effects on hiring, scheduling, pay, discipline, workload, safety, autonomy, and opportunity reviewed?
Are subgroup outcomes, error rates, rating bias, access, promotion, and workload distribution reviewed?
Are monitoring scope, data minimization, purpose limits, retention, and vendor access documented?
Can workers understand, correct, challenge, and appeal consequential outputs?
Are manager review, worker feedback, override authority, and collective governance channels defined?
Are harms, bias, privacy incidents, safety problems, and metric distortion monitored with stop authority?
